name: Gabi Tasting
tagline: Wine tasting management platform for professional wine critics
description: A comprehensive wine tasting management system built for wine critics to organize tastings, manage wineries, review wines, and generate AI-powered tasting notes. Features multi-tenancy with role-based access, OTP authentication, drag-and-drop scheduling, and rich analytics dashboards.
highlights: AI-powered tasting note generation using GPT-4.1 with customizable prompts per critic
Multi-tenant architecture supporting wine critics, wineries, and tasters with role-based access
OTP-based passwordless authentication with session tracking
Drag-and-drop tasting day scheduling with ordered winery assignments
Data analytics dashboards with charts and Excel export capabilities
aiDetails: Claude Code used for development assistance; OpenAI GPT-4.1 integrated for AI-powered tasting note generation
